caption:
Anthropic has accused Alibaba of illicitly extracting its Claude AI model capabilities. This allegation raises significant concerns about intellectual property rights in the AI sector. 🤖💼  

What are the implications for tech companies and their innovations?  

Sources: Reuters, TechCrunch, The Verge
